actions.script: var el = document.querySelector('#prompt-textarea'); if (!el) throw new Error('textarea not found'); el.focus(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); var sel = window.getSelection(); var range = document.createRange(); range.selectNodeContents(el); sel.removeAllRanges(); sel.addRange(range); document.execCommand('delete', false, null); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 200)); document.execCommand('insertText', false, '${message}'); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); var btn = document.querySelector('#composer-submit-button') || document.querySelector('button[data-testid="send-button"]') || document.querySelector('button[aria-label="Send prompt"]'); if (!btn) throw new Error('send button not found'); btn.click(); return 'message_sent';

await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 5000)); var prev = ''; var stable = 0; for (var i = 0; i < 60; i++) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); var genImg = document.querySelector('img[alt^="Generated image"]'); if (genImg && genImg.complete && genImg.naturalWidth > 0) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 30000)); var els = document.querySelectorAll('div[data-message-author-role="assistant"]'); var txt = els.length > 0 ? (els[els.length - 1].innerText || '') : ''; return txt; } var els = document.querySelectorAll('div[data-message-author-role="assistant"]'); if (els.length > 0) { var txt = els[els.length - 1].innerText || ''; if (txt.length > 0 && txt === prev) { stable++; if (stable >= 2) { return txt; } } else { stable = 0; prev = txt; } } } return prev || '';

await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); var imgs = document.querySelectorAll('img[alt^="Generated image"]'); for (var j = imgs.length - 1; j >= 0; j--) { var img = imgs[j]; if (img && img.src && img.src.startsWith('http') && img.complete && img.naturalWidth > 0) { return img.src; } } return '';
